name: Old-Fashioned
recipeInstructions:
1. In an old-fashioned glass, muddle the bitters and water into the sugar cube using the back of a teaspoon.
2. Almost fill the glass with ice cubes and add the whiskey.
3. Garnish with the orange slice and cherry.
4. Serve with a swizzle stick.
Per serving: 267 calories, 0 grams fat (0 percent fat from calories), 0 milligrams cholesterol, 1 gram protein, 15 grams carbohydrate, 2 milligrams sodium.
